title: Ability to apply column permissions at group level rather than board level
excerpt: We would like the ability to restrict permissions at the group level.  For example, we manage our boards by month an each month is a separate group.  When the month’s campaign completes we’d like to lock it down and not …

posts.author: tinasudano1234 (Tina Sudano)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like the ability to restrict permissions at the group level. For example, we manage our boards by month an each month is a separate group. When the month’s campaign completes we’d like to lock it down and not allow updates after that month.
